feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Cloud Applications Studio
feed.subtitle: SAP Cloud Applications Studio Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Change the file name of a Custom Form Template PDF (SAP Business ByDesign)
entry.content:
For SAP Business ByDesign I have created a PDI solution with a custom form template that is based on a custom business object.

The Form Template Header description defined in SAP Cloud Applications Studio is passed as the PDF name when I preview the form.

 

 

How can I change the file name of the PDF? I want to it to be my business object instance ID.

I would assume that this setting must be done in the .xdp file in Adobe Lifecycle Designer.

 

 

 

SAP has defined such logic for Sales Order Confirmations so when I save an output Sales Order Confirmation the Sales Order ID is included in the file name.

 

any ideas?

entry.title: NewSalesJournalEntryVoucher Customisation --- Adding Standard Field Not Working
entry.content:
Hi,

I've followed https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/how-to-guide-for-journal-entry-voucher-excel-customization/ba-p/13291000 a few times before for extension fields, which has worked fine. This time I've been asked to try it with a standard field --- EmployeeID, at the AccountingEntry.Item level. I've added the below line to the XML map as shown in the guide:

And the actual Excel file lets me add the column, and doesn't complain when the information is saved; it creates a sales journal entry voucher. However the Employee ID is empty:

I also tried with data type xs:string instead of tns:IDType --- same result. I don't think it's a question of data type compatibility (the maximum length of IDType is given as 60 characters), as the External Reference at header level has a maximum length of 35 characters, but I'm happy to be proved wrong. Has anyone any ideas?

Thanks,

Lewis

entry.title: Aggregation method for formula using CAP CDS in BAS
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have created Analytical List Page using CAPM. I have successfully added aggregation method SUM to my report shown below:

Now I am trying to add aggregation for formula (margin/quantity) :

after adding above formula, app is showing 1 as MarginUnit and not showing aggregation on group level.

I have added @Analytics.query: true on my entity and using OData V4 for my development. UI5 version is 1.112.1.

Am I missing anything or does CAP CDS support aggregation method FORMULA?

Thank you in advance.

Monika

@david_kunz2  @Willem_Pardaens

entry.title: Cloud Application Studio - Offline Capabilities
entry.content:
Hi community,

we need to deploy a custom connection between an offline iOS application for Image Recognition and SAP C4C Offline Application.

The connection can be via iOS ClipBoard.

Question number 1: There is a way in Cloud Application Studio to read the IPAD o IPHONE clipboard with an action?

Another question about the offline capabilities in visit surveys. I see that in offline I cannot leverage the standard enhancement (BADI) for product redetermination and classification, so I need to use product list to dinamically determine products in surveys.

Question number 2: Can you confirm that the standard product determination via rules works in offline Application for C4C?

Regards,

Francesco

entry.title: SAP Sales C4C Deploy Addon without Applications Studio
entry.content:
We're developing an add-on for a customer and I do not have access to the target SAP Sales Cloud but only to our developing system.

My addon is feature complete and I assembled and downloaded it already. The customer does not have access to SAP Cloud Applications Studio to deploy the package.

Is there a way to send the downloaded zip file to the customer and the customer can install it on the target SAP Sales System without Cloud Applications Studio?

Do I need to create a package with SAP Add-on Assembly Kit or is the zip file sufficient?

Thanks in advance for any input.

entry.title: Show a Disclaimer in SAP Sales Cloud and logout User when the Disclaimer is not confirmed
entry.content:
Dear SAP Community,

we have the requirement to show a Disclaimer when the user log in to the SAP Sales Cloud (SAP Cloud for Customer, SAP C4C). The Disclaimer should show e.g. a pop-up with a text like: "By accessing this database, I herewith acknowledge and confirm that I don't share sensitive information with anyone outside our organization, .....". When the user doesn't confirm this message then the user should be logged out automatically.

Do you have any idea how this could be developed with SAP Cloud Applications Studio (PDI)?

We already make some research:

  • A broadcast message don't log out the user when it is not confirmed. So it doesn't meet our requirements.
  • We don't find an anchor to create an embedded component with modal dialog on the home screen to represent the pop-up when the user log in.
  • We don't find any library where we could log out a user or delete a user session.

Do you have already developed similar requirements with the help of BTP or any hints how this could be achieved within PDI?

Many thanks in advance,
Best Regards, Jasmin

entry.title: POST Survey Response into C4C through OData API
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

We need to post survey responses from an external system to SAP C4C using the OData API. We’ve looked into the following API: [https://myXXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/SurveyResponseRootCollection('ObjectID')/SurveyResponse]

While it successfully creates the survey in C4C associated with a phone call, it's not updating the survey answers. Any assistance would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: SAP Cloud Applications Studio 2411 (Pilot) can not downloawd now !
entry.content:
Hi,SAP

  Why SAP Cloud Applications Studio 2411 (Pilot) can not downloawd  now ? 

Because now the C4C system has upgraded version 2411, the development tools Studio  also need to use

the new, but there is no place to download.

entry.title: Hi Experts How to One BO To Another Bo data Fetch
entry.content:
i want how to material Bo to customer Invoice Bo data fetch 

Like :- Material Bo One Element data Product Category Id i want  In Customer Invoice Bo

entry.title: How to change the partner of a opportunity in customBO?
entry.content:
Hey guys,

I created a new custom BO. There I can read and change data from the customer like this:

 

lr_bezN = gp_von.Relationship.Where(n => n.NodeID == lv_node);
lr_bez = lr_bezN.GetFirst();
if (lr_bez.IsSet() == false){this.status = "3"; return; } //fehler beim verarbeiten
neueBez_NodeData.DistributionChannelCode.content = lr_bez.DistributionChannelCode.content ;
neueBez_NodeData.DivisionCode.content = lr_bez.DivisionCode.content;
neueBez_NodeData.RelationshipBusinessPartnerInternalID = lr_bez.RelationshipBusinessPartnerInternalID;
neueBez_NodeData.RelationshipBusinessPartnerUUID.content = lr_bez.RelationshipBusinessPartnerUUID.content;
neueBez_NodeData.RoleCode.content = lr_bez.RoleCode.content;
neueBez_NodeData.SalesOrganisationUUID.content = lr_bez.SalesOrganisationUUID.content;
var neueBez = gp_to.Relationship.Create(neueBez_NodeData);
if	(neueBez.IsSet()){
}else{
failure = true;
}

 

Now I read all opportunities from a customer

 

var x = gp_von.InternalID;
var OppyVon = Opportunity.QueryByElements;
var OppyVon_SelParams = OppyVon.CreateSelectionParams();
OppyVon_SelParams.Add(OppyVon.PartyPartyKey.PartyID.content, "I", "EQ", x);
var OppyVon_Results = OppyVon.Execute(OppyVon_SelParams);
//my Opportunity
var opportunity2 = OppyVon_Results.Where(n => n.NodeID == lv_node);

 

There are some results, but when I try to change the party from the opportunity..its read only.

When I try to create a opportunity, I got the failure with cross-deployment unit:

Has anybody an idea how to change the customer from the opportunity?

By creating Instance, I got this errors:

KR

entry.title: sap cap xs-security grant authorities for various applications
entry.content:
Hello, I am configuring security scopes for several applications that communicate with our SAP CAP, for which we have created application-type xsuaa services for each of them,

however when trying to give permissions in our scope for those services it keeps giving me 401 unauthorized

However when I only add one service to the scope, this one works fine for me Could you help me know what causes this behavior? greetings and thanks

This is the xs-security of my application 


where I give authorization to the UAA application type services

 

and this is my xs-security from the UAA service uaaemployeetimes

and this is my xs-security from the UAA service uaacitasmedicas

entry.title: Excel Add-in SSO login issue with script error
entry.content:
Hello,

We have implemented MFA for our ByDesign system and the SSO login works fine with Test system for browser and excel add-in. For production system works fine with browser but excel add-in throws script error. 

We reached SAP via incident and it seems the browser setting needs to be changed and to work with our internal IT but we need to know which setting need to be changed. 

Also it works fine with our personal machine. Does anybody can help or faced this kind of problem ?

 

Thanks, 

Madhan

entry.title: Tutorials for Creating a full stack CAP application using separate layers of UI5, node.js and HANA
entry.content:
Hello,

I am looking for tutorials, where I can build separate modules for Node.Js, UI5 and HANA, and then connect them together to form a fully fledged application, based on a use case from one of the previous projects I was a small part of, so as to upskill myself and apply the knowledge in my future projects. 

However, I could not find any tutorials, for connecting separately created modules to this purpose. 

 

Could anyone please help me with the same, where I can find the relevant resources?

 

Many thanks in advance.

entry.title: Looking for advanced training material and/or classes
entry.content: We're looking for advanced training material and or classes for using SAP Cloud Application Studio to enhance our instance of SAP Business ByDesign. For instance, there's only one tutorial series under learning.sap.com that touches on the UI Designer and it's very basic.

entry.title: How to update data in custom facet with the use of data workbench C4C?
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Good Morning!!!

I have created a custom facet called "PO Details" in Opportunity BO. In that facet there are 4 columns where  end users need to fill PO details manually. Now they have 100 or more than 100 Opportunities where they need to fill the data in custom facet, so they want these data will be filled automatically by uploading excel sheet in PO details facet.

Is it possible, if we can upload excel sheet in custom facet with the updated data in sheet and based on that data, details updated in dedicated columns. Can we do this with the help of data workbench in c4c? If yes, then please guide with the steps.

Thank you!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915

entry.title: How to configure attachment type for custom BO in C4C?
entry.content:
Hi experts,

 

I want to configure attachment type dropdown list for custom BO, developed in SDK.

As in the pre delivered usage type Standard BOs are there so i can use newly created attachment type in standard BO but how i can use in custom BO?

Default attachment types are coming in custom BO. 

 

How to achive this using SDK ?

C4C Extensibility SAP Cloud Applications Studio C4C Sales C4C Service

entry.title: Empty content in RESTCallResult for GET when using ExecuteRESTService
entry.content:
We have used several times WebServiceUtilities.ExecuteRESTService() and WebServiceUtilities.ExecuteRESTServiceWithoutEncoding(). So far the RequestMethod had always been "POST" and everything worked fine. The body of the Response was always included in the returned RESTCallResult.content structure.

Now I want to add another call with one of the above methods in an absl script, but now the result is not returning any content in the absl file.

When calling the REST Service in Postman, everything works fine and I am sure that the webservice is returning the xml structure.

What I am missing here? What would be the correct way to get xml content from a GET REST Webservice if this is not the correct script method?

entry.title: Not Yet Published Object
entry.content:
Dear SAP Expert,

We are currently working on a development project and encountering the following error when attempting to download or check our patch solution in the SDK.

It seems that there is an issue in the UI Designer.

We are unsure how to publish the object listed below. Could you kindly guide us on how to resolve this issue as soon as possible?

-----------------------------

Not yet published object: /YEGXXXXXX_MAIN/CHANGE_TRANSACTIONS/Partner/ChangeFieldVisibility/73fXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXXda.uichange Not yet published 

----------------------------

BR
Chen

entry.title: Generate PDF Form binary with script in SDK
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

 

In SAP Cloud Applications Studio, I am trying to generate a pdf form with this function:

var formTemplateCode : OutputRequestFormTemplateCode;
formTemplateCode.content = "ME_08";
var formTemplateLanguage = "E";
var binary :BinaryObject;

binary = OutputManagementUtilities.GetPDF(this, formTemplateCode, formTemplateLanguage);

The code is in the Root-AfterModify.absl of an OutboundDelivery business object extension and I am trying to generate a Delivery Note form.

When testing with debug, we are going through those lines but the result of "binary" always is empty.

I have read the documentation of "OutputDocumentUtilities" and it seems to be usable in the SDK for SAP ByDesign.

 

Do someone has any ideas of hat can be the problem here?

 

Thank you for your help,

Marion Marolany

entry.title: Indicator value shows as X and # in C4C report instead of YES or NO.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

Is there any way to display YES or NO in report for custom indicator field instead of X and #?

In my case i have created a custom indicator field in opportunity overview page. I have fetch that field in report with Odata service. After extracting report, i see that indicator field value shows as X and # instead of YES or NO. I have tried to set it but it won't work.  Can anyone guide me on this?

 

 

Thank you!!!

 

Regards,

Dhaval Solanki

+91 9898712915
